Title: Login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Open home page; 2. Open login modal; 3. Enter valid username/password; 4. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: User is logged in and Welcome message is shown

Title: Login with invalid password
Steps: 1. Open login modal; 2. Enter valid username and invalid password; 3. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: Error dialog displays Wrong password

Title: Login with non-existing user
Steps: 1. Open login modal; 2. Enter unknown username/password; 3. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: Error dialog displays User does not exist

Title: Login with empty username and password
Steps: 1. Open login modal; 2. Leave fields blank; 3. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: Validation dialog prompts required fields

Title: Login with empty username only
Steps: 1. Open login modal; 2. Keep username empty; 3. Fill password; 4. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: Validation dialog prompts required fields

Title: Login with empty password only
Steps: 1. Open login modal; 2. Fill username; 3. Keep password empty; 4. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: Validation dialog prompts required fields

Title: Logout after successful login
Steps: 1. Click Log out
ExpectedResult: Welcome message disappears and login link is visible

Title: Login with leading/trailing spaces
Steps: 1. Open login modal; 2. Enter username/password with spaces; 3. Click Log in
ExpectedResult: System behavior is consistent and documented (trimmed or rejected)

Title: Add product to cart from product detail page
Steps: 1. Open product detail page; 2. Click Add to cart
ExpectedResult: Success dialog Product added is shown

Title: View added product in cart
Preconditions: User added at least one product
Steps: 1. Open Cart page
ExpectedResult: Added product row is displayed in cart table

Title: Place order successfully with all required data
Preconditions: User has at least one product in cart
Steps: 1. Open Cart; 2. Click Place Order; 3. Fill required fields; 4. Click Purchase
ExpectedResult: Success popup Thank you for your purchase appears with order details

Title: Place order with empty Name and Credit Card
Preconditions: User has at least one product in cart
Steps: 1. Open Place Order dialog; 2. Leave Name and Credit Card empty; 3. Click Purchase
ExpectedResult: Validation dialog asks to fill Name and Creditcard

Title: Place order with only required fields
Preconditions: User has at least one product in cart
Steps: 1. Open Place Order; 2. Fill Name and Credit Card only; 3. Click Purchase
ExpectedResult: Order is completed if optional fields are not mandatory

Title: Delete product from cart
Preconditions: User has at least one product in cart
Steps: 1. Open Cart; 2. Click Delete on a product
ExpectedResult: Product row is removed and total is updated

Title: Open cart without logging in
Steps: 1. Open Cart page
ExpectedResult: System behavior is validated (cart access and actions align with expected rules)

Title: Add same product multiple times
Steps: 1. Open same product detail; 2. Click Add to cart multiple times
ExpectedResult: Cart shows expected quantity behavior without data corruption

Title: Refresh cart page after adding items
Steps: 1. Add product; 2. Open cart; 3. Refresh
ExpectedResult: Cart persistence is maintained after reload

Title: Try placing order on empty cart
Steps: 1. Open cart; 2. Click Place Order; 3. Submit
ExpectedResult: Order should be blocked or clearly handled without silent failure

Title: Very long buyer name input
Steps: 1. Open Place Order; 2. Enter long Name; 3. Submit
ExpectedResult: Application handles long input safely

Title: Invalid credit card format input
Steps: 1. Open Place Order; 2. Enter invalid card value; 3. Submit
ExpectedResult: Validation and system behavior are consistent and documented
